description: This file provides a stub implementation of an SMS provider class used for development and testing environments. It implements the SmsProvider interface and logs SMS sending activities without actually sending messages.

classes.name: StubSmsProvider
classes.description: A stub implementation of the SmsProvider interface that logs SMS messages instead of sending them. Used for development and CI environments.

methods.name: StubSmsProvider
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the provider with notification properties.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Logs an SMS message with details such as sender, recipient, and message content.
